2606.31422.title: Ask the World Before Acting: Budgeted Environment Probing for World-Model Calibration
2606.31422.paper_summary: Long-horizon language agents do not only choose actions; they carry a private model of the world from one decision to the next. When that model drifts, a later failure can be decided before the failing action is ever taken. We study a direct repair mechanism: before committing to the next task action, an agent may ask the environment about one belief field and write the answer back into its world model. This makes environment interaction a scarce calibration resource, not merely a way to advance the task. We introduce \method, a budgeted probing operator for structured belief tables. The useful probes are not the same everywhere. Procedural beliefs, such as tool dependencies, can often be repaired by targeted checks, but those checks spend steps that the task may need. Spatial beliefs, such as object locations and graph edges, rely more on structural cues; the agent's own confidence can be a poor guide when the world changes off-screen. A type-stratified analysis formalizes this probe-action frontier, and controlled experiments show that mid-planning environment evidence reduces terminal world-model error when the probe policy follows the structure of the task.
2606.31422.paper_summary_zh: 長期語言代理不僅僅是選擇行動；它們在每次決策之間攜帶著一個私有的世界模型。當該模型漂移時，後續的失敗可以在失敗的行動被採取之前就已經決定。我們研究了一種直接修復機制：在承諾下一個任務行動之前，代理可以向環境詢問一個信念領域，並將答案寫回其世界模型中。這使得環境互動成為一種稀缺的校準資源，而不僅僅是推進任務的一種方式。我們介紹了\method，一種用於結構化信念表的預算探測運算子。有效的探測在各處並不相同。程序性信念，例如工具依賴，通常可以通過針對性的檢查來修復，但這些檢查會消耗任務可能需要的步驟。空間信念，例如物體位置和圖邊，則更依賴於結構線索；當世界在畫面外變化時，代理自身的信心可能是一個不佳的指導。類型分層分析形式化了這一探測-行動邊界，並且控制實驗顯示，當探測策略遵循任務結構時，中期規劃的環境證據能減少終端世界模型的誤差。
2606.31422.author: Xinyuan Song et.al.
